# THUMBNAIL_IMAGE_DATA_FIELD_NAME

****

The name of the thumbnail image data field.

## Declaration

```swift
const String THUMBNAIL_IMAGE_DATA_FIELD_NAME;
```

## Properties

- **NAME**: The name of the share record type `CloudKit.share`.
- **TITLE_FIELD_NAME**: The name of the title field.
- **TYPE_FIELD_NAME**: The name of the type field.
